events.apidestination.ConnectionArn.Docs: The ARN of the connection to use for the API destination. The destination endpoint must support the authorization type specified for the connection.

events.apidestination.Description.Docs: A description for the API destination to create.

events.apidestination.HttpMethod.Docs: The method to use for the request to the HTTP invocation endpoint.
events.apidestination.HttpMethod.Allowed values: DELETE | GET | HEAD | OPTIONS | PATCH | POST | PUT

events.apidestination.InvocationEndpoint.Docs: The URL to the HTTP invocation endpoint for the API destination.

events.apidestination.InvocationRateLimi.Docs: The maximum number of requests per second to send to the HTTP invocation endpoint.

events.apidestination.Name.Docs: The name for the API destination to create.
